scripts.build: pnpm --filter @wilson-romero/tigo build && pnpm --filter @wilson-romero/carbon build && pnpm --filter @wilson-romero/polaris build && pnpm --filter @wilson-romero/base build && pnpm --filter @wilson-romero/lightning build && pnpm --filter @wilson-romero/pajamas build && pnpm --filter @wilson-romero/primer build && pnpm --filter @wilson-romero/spectrum build && pnpm --filter @wilson-romero/antd build
scripts.type-check: pnpm --filter @wilson-romero/tigo type-check && pnpm --filter @wilson-romero/carbon type-check && pnpm --filter @wilson-romero/polaris type-check
